name: long-running-harness
description: Anthropic-style long-running application harness with explicit multi-agent sprint orchestration.

interface.longDescription: Runs an Anthropic-style long-running application harness with initializer, planner, generator, evaluator, and coordinator roles, explicit sprint strategy, quantified QA, and a completion ledger.
defaultPrompt: Build an app using a long-running harness.
Review whether this harness really followed the sprint plan.
Run continuous multi-agent app delivery until done.
